title: Workplace disagreement
subtitle: Disagree professionally and move toward action.
duolingoBridge: Growth bridges B1 output into B2 preparation through native-style input, longer reasoning, nuance, synthesis, register control, and autonomous correction.
overview: Knowledge point 1: disagree with the proposal, not the person.
Knowledge point 2: suggest a next step.

sections.title: B2 bridge tools
rows: je ne suis pas entièrement convaincu
it is not against the idea
it would be useful to test...

items.fr: Je ne suis pas entièrement convaincu par cette proposition.
items.en: I am not entirely convinced by this proposal.
items.es: No estoy totalmente convencido por esta propuesta.

items.fr: Ce n’est pas contre l’idée générale, qui me semble intéressante.
items.en: It is not against the general idea, which seems interesting to me.
items.es: No es contra la idea general, que me parece interesante.

items.fr: Ma réserve porte surtout sur le délai prévu.
items.en: My reservation mainly concerns the planned deadline.
items.es: Mi reserva se refiere sobre todo al plazo previsto.

items.fr: Il serait utile de tester cette solution sur une petite partie du projet.
items.en: It would be useful to test this solution on a small part of the project.
items.es: Sería útil probar esta solución en una pequeña parte del proyecto.

items.fr: Avant de prendre une décision, nous devrions comparer les résultats.
items.en: Before making a decision, we should compare the results.
items.es: Antes de tomar una decisión, deberíamos comparar los resultados.
